global.description: The ad features a game promotion with a bold logo and inviting text.
global.main_message: Join the arena and play with friends tonight.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo that reads 'StormByte' in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A visual representation of a game interface featuring four circular icons arranged in a grid pattern.

elements.label: Top decorative shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in the background that add visual interest, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: Another view of the game interface with additional circular icons, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Left decorative shape
elements.description: A vertical decorative element on the left side of the ad, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Right decorative shape
elements.description: A small decorative element on the right side of the ad, complementing the design.

elements.label: Join the arena
elements.description: A clear and inviting text phrase that encourages users to join the game, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Play with friends
elements.description: A supportive text line that emphasizes social play, located below the main call to action.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: A small decorative shape at the top, adding to the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: Another small decorative shape at the top, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'StormByte' is prominently displayed at the top in a large, bold font.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A descriptive text that invites players to join the game with friends, centrally positioned.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button that says 'Watch now', located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, StormByte logo, game interface.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the app screenshots are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
